#### Got a Startup idea to launch?
We are pleased to answer any startup-related questions. You are launched team will help you with idea validation, UI/UX design service, Custom MVP app development, and beyond.
Book a Call now
## Custom App Development Process
We offer services for every stage:
#### App development team is far from next-door ‘body shops’
We know how to convert visitors into users. We know what to do with A/B testing after launch. You are launched understands what to do with custom MVP app development and **how downgrading the startup failure rate from 99.7% to 42%.** Originally, it is possible mainly because of The Lean Startup approach used by our team.
#### Stage 1
### Idea Stage
![Idea related collage, as a reference to startup idea stage](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fidea_stage.5a11fbd5.webp&w=1080&q=75)
**Powerful concepts are the foundation** of every flourishing startup, yet making them happen takes more than just dreaming about them.
**Our Idea Validation process is intended to define your notion** so that it satisfies both consumer needs and prospects for success. We perform comprehensive market research, competitor analysis, and feasibility investigations; therefore, we will give you an unambiguous direction on which you can proceed with assurance.
**Learn about our strategic technique** that can make your idea a successful product.
[Read MoreRead More about Idea Stage](https://www.urlaunched.com/expertise/idea "Read more about Idea Stage")
#### Stage 2
### Prototyping & UI/UX Design
![Prototyping collage, as a reference to prototyping as a services](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fdesign.b60567fe.webp&w=1080&q=75)
**You would need a design to validate your startup idea.** Sure, you can try to go as Craigslist, but there are plenty of competitors already on the market, and it is hard to use the Blue Ocean Strategy.
**So, let's proceed with User-Driven features** and content before proceeding to custom MVP app development.
[Read MoreRead More about Prototyping & UI/UX Design](https://www.urlaunched.com/expertise/design "Read more about Prototyping & UI/UX Design")
#### Stage 3
### MVP App Development
![Man with laptop, as a reference to MVP development stage](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fmvp_app_development.a15103b4.webp&w=1080&q=75)
Congrats, you have the assumption that your Startup Idea is valid. **Now, we need to test this on real users** before getting into generating profit. For this, we would need to work on a custom MVP app development.
As a rule, the shortest time slot needed to get your startup's MVP is three months. Once this is done, **we can get users on board and dig into A/B** , but this is a completely different story.
[Read MoreRead More about MVP App Development](https://www.urlaunched.com/services/mvp-development-services "Read more about MVP App Development")
#### Stage 4
### Scaling Stage
![Man walking the table chart, as a reference to Scaling stage](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2Fscaling_stage.424b7b16.webp&w=1080&q=75)
**Can a Startup generate a lot of profit without a high-quality app?** - probably not. Will you have more chances with great design and smooth animation in the app? - definitely yes. That's why we provide custom iOS app development, custom Android app development, and custom Web app development services.
[Read MoreRead More about Scaling Stage](https://www.urlaunched.com/expertise/scaling-stage-startup "Read more about Scaling Stage")

We have some tips for you

## FAQ: MVP App Development
### What is MVP in software?
![Plus icon](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2FFAQ_contorls_1.537d2436.webp&w=128&q=75)
MVP (Minimum Viable Product) in software is the basic version of a product with just enough features to satisfy early users and provide feedback for future development.
### How to choose a reliable MVP development company?
![Plus icon](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2FFAQ_contorls_1.537d2436.webp&w=128&q=75)
Select an MVP development company with proven expertise, strong client testimonials, and a transparent process.
### What is the meaning of MVP in software development?
![Plus icon](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2FFAQ_contorls_1.537d2436.webp&w=128&q=75)
MVP in software development refers to the initial version of a product that includes only the core functionalities necessary to validate the concept and gather user feedback.
### Why is startup MVP development important for entrepreneurs?
![Plus icon](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2FFAQ_contorls_1.537d2436.webp&w=128&q=75)
Startup MVP development allows entrepreneurs to test their ideas in the market with minimal investment, reducing risks and speeding up the learning process.
### How much does it cost to build a minimum viable product?
![Plus icon](https://www.urlaunched.com/_next/image?url=%2F_next%2Fstatic%2Fmedia%2FFAQ_contorls_1.537d2436.webp&w=128&q=75)
The cost to build a minimum viable product typically ranges from $10,000 to $50,000, depending on the complexity and scope of the project.
![dots](https://www.urlaunched.com/images/industries/dots/dots.svg)
